selectorIdioma.descripcion: Choose the interface language. Your preference is saved to your account.

bannerCookies.texto: We use first-party cookies to improve your experience. Read our

panelMetricas.mensajeVacio: The backend is opening the SSH session and collecting data. Metrics will appear here in a few seconds.

hero.titulo: Manage your VPS without touching the terminal
hero.descripcion: Forget complicated commands. Connect over SSH and deploy your apps instantly with a sleek, powerful interface.

funcionalidades.descripcion: Smooth, fast workflows designed for teams that prioritize speed.

item1.descripcion: Securely connect to your server over SSH—no intrusive scripts or heavy agents. Your credentials are encrypted end to end.

item2.descripcion: Upload compressed projects or link a Git repo. Ideal for prototypes without complex CI/CD pipelines.

item3.descripcion: Full encryption ensures your infrastructure management stays completely secure and private every step of the way.

item4.descripcion: Optimize settings and troubleshoot issues with our infrastructure copilot. Receive suggestions based on your server's live state.

comoFunciona.descripcion: From code to production in three steps

paso1.descripcion: Provide your SSH credentials. The platform auto-configures your environment in line with current security standards.

paso2.descripcion: Drag and drop ZIP files or link Git repos—pick whatever fits your workflow.

paso3.descripcion: Nginx, SSL with Let's Encrypt, and process management with PM2 or Docker. Your app is live instantly.

precios.descripcion: Start for free. Scale when you need to. No hidden fees.

pro.descripcion: For teams with apps in production.

cta.descripcion: Join hundreds of developers who have left the terminal behind. Start for free and scale today.

seccion1.parrafo1: In accordance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society and E-Commerce Services (LSSI-CE), the owner of the AutoDeploy website is Alejandro Bravo Calderón, with address in Cádiz, Spain.

seccion2.parrafo: This legal notice governs the use of the AutoDeploy website, a platform for managing VPS servers through a web interface. Accessing the website implies full acceptance of the terms set out herein.

seccion3.parrafo: The contents of the website (text, images, logos, source code, and graphic design) are the property of the owner and are protected by current intellectual property legislation. Their full or partial reproduction without express authorization is prohibited.

seccion4.parrafo: AutoDeploy does not guarantee the continuous availability of the service nor accepts liability for damages arising from technical interruptions, unauthorized access, or data loss attributable to causes beyond its control.

seccion5.parrafo: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals of Cádiz, expressly waiving any other jurisdiction.

seccion1.parrafo: The controller of the personal data collected through AutoDeploy is Alejandro Bravo Calderón, with address in Cádiz, Spain. You can contact us at

seccion2.intro: We collect the following data when you sign up:
seccion2.item2Descripcion: to connect to your servers on your behalf, encrypted at rest.
seccion2.item3Descripcion: deployment logs and server metrics to show you the history.

seccion3.parrafo: The processing is based on the performance of the service contract you accept when signing up (Art. 6.1.b GDPR). The processing of analytics cookies is based on your consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR).

seccion4.parrafo: Data is retained for as long as your account remains active. When you delete your account, your data is removed within a maximum of 30 days, unless there is a legal obligation to retain it.

seccion5.parrafo: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, object to, and restrict the processing of your data. You can exercise these rights by writing to
seccion5.cierre: You may also lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (aepd.es).

seccion1.parrafo: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device when you visit them. They are used to remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and analyze site usage.

gestion.parrafo: You can accept or reject non-essential cookies from the banner that appears when you visit the site. You can also delete cookies from your browser settings at any time. Note that disabling technical cookies may affect how the service works.

login.panelTexto: Your infrastructure is waiting. A persistent SSH session, a clean dashboard, and live metrics from second zero.
login.panelItem2: Immediate access to your servers and deployments
login.panelItem3: Real-time SSH metrics, no intrusive agents
login.subtitulo: Enter your credentials to access the control panel.

register.panelTexto: Connect your VPS via SSH, deploy your apps in one click, and monitor everything in real time from a single clean dashboard.
register.panelItem1Descripcion: SSH credentials, no intrusive scripts or heavy agents.
register.panelItem2Descripcion: ZIP or Git repo, whichever fits your workflow.
register.panelItem3Descripcion: Nginx + SSL + PM2 / Docker configured instantly.
register.subtitulo: Start managing your infrastructure in minutes.
register.errorPasswordInvalida: The password does not meet all requirements

confirmarFree.resumen: The essentials to connect your first server and start deploying for free.

bajada.descripcion: You'll keep your account and your servers, but you'll lose immediate access to premium features.

alta.titulo: Ready to deploy your first app.
alta.descripcion: No credit card or trial period. Create your account and connect your server in under two minutes.

dashboard.subtitulo: Real-time infrastructure overview · all systems streaming

vacio.detalle: Connect your first VPS to start monitoring and deploying

seccion.liveMonitoringDescripcion: A persistent SSH session is kept per server. Metrics refresh every 30 seconds.
seccion.serversDescripcion: Direct access per row · manage or jump into the shell.
seccion.recentActivityDescripcion: Latest events logged across servers and deployments.
seccion.recentDeploymentsDescripcion: Builds and rollouts ordered by start time.

aplicaciones.vacio: No applications deployed on this server yet.

logsTerminal.subtitulo: Real-time log stream and interactive shell · filter by severity to stay focused.

visor.vacioDetalle: Events will appear here as soon as something happens: deployments, connections, alerts.

terminal.sinServidores: No servers configured. Add one from "Connect server" to open a shell.
terminal.elegirServidorParte1: Pick a server above and press

nuevoDespliegue.subtitulo: Configure runtime, source code, and target server to launch your application.

zip.arrastrar: Drag your .zip here or click to select

paso03.nota: We'll automatically configure an Nginx instance as a reverse proxy for this service.

pie.tlsOn: TLS automatically managed by Let's Encrypt
pie.tlsOff: TLS off — only enable it in production

errores.repositorioRequerido: The repository URL is required for Git deployments.
errores.zipDemasiadoGrande: File exceeds the maximum allowed size (50 MB)
errores.zipFallido: ZIP deployment could not be completed

exito.registrado: Deployment registered. Redirecting to the dashboard…

onboarding.subtitulo: Enter your VPS credentials to start managing deployments, monitoring, and backups.

formulario.claveSshPlaceholder: Paste your private key here (OpenSSH format, BEGIN/END lines included)
formulario.claveSshPista: Paste the full contents of your private key, including the BEGIN and END lines.

ayuda.descripcionParte2: on your server to find the IP address.

aviso.descParte3: . After that, the account will revert to the Free plan.

seccion01.descripcion: Activity calendar since the account was created.

tenure.leyendaInaugural: Welcome aboard. Your first day is being logged.

seccion02.descripcion: The name and email your teammates will see inside this workspace.

formulario.emailPista: Only used for billing and security alerts.

seccion03.descripcion: Three altitudes. Billing prorated on every change.

seccion04.descripcion: Public keys for passwordless authentication on every server you connect.

cuenta.clavesVacioDetalle: Add a public key to enable passwordless connections.

seccion05.descripcion: Choose which events reach your inbox. Everything is opt-in.

cuenta.notifEmailDetalle: Receive deployment and status updates by email.
cuenta.notifCriticasDetalle: Get notified when CPU, RAM, or disk usage exceeds 90%.
cuenta.notifDespliegesDetalle: Every successful or failed build, the moment it happens.

seccion06.descripcion: Choose the interface language. Your preference is saved to your account and applied instantly.

seccion07.descripcion: Hold the button down for a full second to end this session.

billing.subtitulo: Subscription, payment methods, and invoices in one place.

seccion01.descripcion: Live consumption against your plan limits. Resets every billing cycle.

seccion02.descripcion: Card stored encrypted by Stripe — our server never sees it.

metodoPagoVacio.detalle: Add a card to unlock upgrades and automatic monthly billing. We never store the full PAN — only a tokenized reference via Stripe.

seccion03.descripcion: Past charges ordered by date · downloadable as PDF.

billing.facturasVacioDetalle: When you upgrade your plan, each charge will appear here automatically with a downloadable receipt.
billing.pieTexto: Stripe handles every charge · PCI-DSS Level 1 compliant

networking.subtitulo: Domains, DNS records, and SSL certificates · routed through your servers.
networking.formularioDescripcion: DNS propagation usually takes between 5 and 60 minutes.
networking.dominiosDescripcion: Registered hostnames pointing to this workspace.
networking.vacioDetalle: Add your first domain to start routing traffic to your server.
networking.accionesDescripcion: Run the most common DNS and SSL flows in one click.
networking.renovarDetalle: Force a Let's Encrypt renewal cycle
networking.pieTexto: SSL managed by Let's Encrypt · auto-renewal enabled

modalRedirects.vacio: No redirects configured · they will be written to `$HOME/.autodeploy/redirects.conf` on save.

mensajes.errorAgregar: Could not add the domain. Please try again.
mensajes.renovacionFallida: SSL renewal failed on one or more servers.

firewall.subtitulo: Inbound and outbound traffic rules · managed under the hood by ufw.
firewall.formularioDescripcion: All fields are applied by ufw within seconds.
firewall.reglasDescripcion: Rules ordered by priority · enforced by ufw on the host.
firewall.vacioDetalle: Add rules manually or pick one of the presets above to quickly secure your server.
firewall.pieTexto: Backed by ufw · changes apply instantly over SSH

mensajes.errorPreset: Could not add the preset rule

backups.subtitulo: Snapshots and restore points · stored encrypted off-server.
backups.autoDetalle: Daily snapshots at {{hora}} UTC · retained for 7 days · cron installed via SSH
backups.snapshotsDescripcion: Restore points ordered by date · press "Restore" to revert.
backups.vacioDetalle: Create your first backup or enable automatic snapshots above to protect your infrastructure.
backups.pieTexto: Snapshots encrypted with AES-256 · stored off-server

mensajes.cronInstalado: Cron installed · daily snapshots at {{hora}} UTC
mensajes.confirmRestaurar: This will restore the server state from this snapshot. A safety snapshot will be created automatically before the restore. Continue?
mensajes.restoreIniciado: Restore started · a pre-restore safety snapshot will appear shortly

terminalSelector.subtitulo: Open a fully interactive SSH session on any connected server.
terminalSelector.vacioDetalle: First add a server from "Connect server" to open SSH sessions.
terminalSelector.bloqueDescripcion: Click a host to open a live PTY session in the browser.
terminalSelector.pieTexto: Interactive PTY · 100% real bash · bidirectional WebSocket

pago.subtitulo: Your connection is encrypted and secure
pago.nombreTitularPlaceholder: As it appears on the card
pago.infoSeguridad: Simulated payment — no real charge will be made
pago.exitoDescripcion: Your {{nombrePlan}} plan is now active. Welcome aboard.
pago.errorDescripcion: We couldn't complete the payment. Please try again.
pago.planProDescripcion: For teams with apps in production

validacion.nombreMinimoCaracteres: The name must be at least 3 characters
validacion.nombreSoloLetras: The name can only contain letters

asistenteIa.subtitulo: Ask me to do anything on your server in plain language. Before touching anything, I'll show you the exact command.
asistenteIa.avisoTitulo: You haven't configured your OpenRouter key yet.
asistenteIa.avisoTexto: You need a key to chat with the AI. Open the settings to enter it.
asistenteIa.bienvenidaTitulo: How can I help you today?
asistenteIa.bienvenidaTexto: Start with one of these questions or write your own. I'll translate it into shell commands.
asistenteIa.placeholderEntrada: Type what you want to do on your server…

config.apiKeyConfigurada: You already have a key saved. Leave it blank to keep it.
config.apiKeyNueva: Get one for free at openrouter.ai/keys
config.modeloAyuda: Models marked as free do not consume credits.
config.comandosAyuda: Commands starting with these prefixes will run without asking for permission. Empty = ask for permission for everything.

sugerencias.disco: How much free disk space is left?
sugerencias.cpu: List the processes consuming the most CPU

mensajes.seleccionaServidor: Select a server before sending the message

apiDocs.subtitulo: Integrate AutoDeploy into your technical stack with our complete REST API. Standard JSON, JWT authentication, and real-time WebSockets.

autenticacion.descripcion: All calls require a JWT token in the Authorization header. Get your token through the login endpoint.

endpoints.descripcion: The most used routes to manage servers, deployments, and configuration.

respuestas.descripcion: Standard HTTP codes. All responses follow the ApiResponse format with success, message, and data.

websockets.descripcion: Three WebSocket channels for interactive SSH terminal, streaming metrics, and push notifications.

llamadaFinal.texto: Access the interactive documentation with Swagger UI to try each endpoint directly from your browser.

documentacion.subtitulo: Learn to use AutoDeploy from scratch. Step-by-step tutorials to set up servers, deploy applications, and manage your infrastructure.

primerosPasos.descripcion: Basic concepts to start using the platform.

guia1.texto: Add a VPS by entering IP, user, and SSH credentials. The connection is validated automatically.

guia2.texto: Use private keys instead of passwords for a more secure connection to your server.

guia3.texto: Deploy a project from a Git repository with a single click. Automatic detection of application type.

guia4.texto: Configure DNS records and SSL certificates so your application is reachable through a public domain.

operaciones.descripcion: Common tasks to keep your services in production.

guia1.texto: Open and close ports, create rules by IP, and keep your server secure from the interface.

guia2.texto: Schedule daily or weekly backups. The tar.gz files are stored on the VPS and registered on the platform.

guia3.texto: Configure HTTP redirects and nginx proxy rules from the Networking section.

guia4.texto: Monitor CPU, memory, and disk with a panel refreshed every second via WebSocket.

avanzado.descripcion: For users who want to get the most out of the platform.

guia1.texto: Connect your GitHub Actions pipeline to deploy automatically when pushing to the main branch.

guia2.texto: Ask the assistant to run commands on your server by describing what you want in natural language.

guia3.texto: Change your plan, view your invoice, and manage payment methods from the Billing section.

estado.subtitulo: Live monitoring of every AutoDeploy component. Automatic refresh every 30 seconds.

contacto.subtitulo: Got a question, a suggestion, or a problem? Write to us through the channel you prefer and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

exito.texto: We have prepared the message with the data from the form. Review it and press send in your email client.

comunidad.subtitulo: Learn, share, and build with people deploying applications every day. Forums, live chat, and resources created by the community.

github.texto: Ask, propose improvements, and follow the project's development.

discord.texto: Live chat with other users and the maintenance team.

twitter.texto: News, releases, and tricks about continuous deployments.

reddit.texto: Long-form conversations, shared guides, and technical debates.

recursos.descripcion: Content created by members to help you get more out of the platform.

recurso1.texto: Complete guide to take a Next.js application to production with SSL and its own domain.

recurso2.texto: Strategy to keep daily copies for a week and weekly copies for a month.

recurso3.texto: Recommended configuration to reduce your server's attack surface.
